Isometric Stone Soup by Screaming Brain Studios (CC0) This pack has been converted from the Dungeon Crawl Stone Soup (CC0) tileset collection. Original Source: https://opengameart.org/content/dungeon-crawl-32x32-tiles-supplemental Wall Tiles ========== There are *.tsx tile-sheets for Tiled Map Editor for every tileset, which lets you mix and match tiles as needed. All Block tile-sheets also contain flat "Top Face" tiles which can be used as overlays on top of walls. These are found right beneath each of the Full and Half block tiles in every tile-sheet. This allows for hiding the top of certain blocks that may have decorations or features you only wish to be displayed on the sides of the block. Floor Tiles =========== All tile-sheets have been organized and named using the original Dungeon
